title: 🪓 Divine Data Corruption
name: Divine Data Corruption
what_it_is: The breakdown of celestial or sacred systems through noise, entropy, or overload—gods glitched by belief, holy code fragmenting.
how_to_use: her crown is corrupted divinity—glitching symbols cascade down from sacred overload
the god bleeds data—his form collapsing in sacred noise
animation_behavior: Symbols flicker out of phase, divinity loops and distorts, light bleeds into glitch fractals ---
